column1: Source: U. Michael Bergman and Camilla Hu Worm (2021), "Economic Policy Uncertainty and Consumer Perceptions: The Danish Case". Data available at http://www.policyuncertainty.com/denmark_monthly.html. These data can be used freely with attribution to the authors and website.
* The EPU_BBD index is a measure of domestic economic policy uncertainty in Danish newspapers using the same keywords as in the paper “Measuring Economic Policy Uncertainty” by Scott R. Baker
** The EPU_extended index is a measure of domestic economic policy uncertainty in Danish newspapers using an extended set of policy-relevant keywords.
